description: Schema for storing extracted chart pattern data and feature signals from rhythm game charts

chart_patterns.description: Core chart pattern metadata and extraction identity

chart_id.description: Unique identifier for a chart (linked to chart_registry)

extraction_version.description: Version of the pattern extraction algorithm

pattern_hash.description: Hash of extracted pattern for deduplication and integrity

note_count.description: Total number of notes in chart

difficulty_signal.description: Computed scalar difficulty signal from pattern extraction

pattern_features.description: Aggregated machine-readable features used in Phase 5 learning and Phase 7 ranking

stream_length_avg.description: Average length of continuous note streams

pattern_score_json.description: Serialized JSON with per-pattern taxonomy scores

pattern_blobs.description: Storage pointer to full pattern structure blobs (compressed)

blob_path.description: Relative path to stored zip/binary blob

constraints.description: Each chart can have multiple extraction versions but must be unique per version

design_notes: chart_patterns represents immutable extracted results from file scan
pattern_features are optimized for runtime inference (Phase 5 & Phase 7)
pattern_blobs store reconstructable raw pattern structure
extraction_version is critical for reproducibility and model consistency
game_id enables multi-game support and adapter-based ingestion
pattern_hash enables deduplication and integrity checks
schema is designed to separate heavy extraction (offline) from lightweight inference (runtime)
